title: potentilla subcrenata
intro: Potentilla subcrenata, also known as the creeping cinquefoil, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to East Asia, belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Potentilla subcrenata include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as aiding in the treatment of digestive problems, fever, and respiratory issues. Potentilla subcrenata is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
